title: Cybersecurity & Privacy Readiness
promise: Cybersecurity and privacy readiness assessment for governance, protection, response, recovery, and privacy operations.
audience: Startups, SMEs, boards, family offices, investors, and vendors undergoing customer diligence
description: Cyber and privacy maturity assessment across Govern & Identify, Protect, Detect & Respond, Recover & Privacy. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate evidence-confidence checks.
ogDescription: Cybersecurity and privacy readiness assessment for governance, protection, response, recovery, and privacy operations.
